title: Billing & Invoices
subtitle: Your partner billing overview
choosePlan: Choose a plan to get started
manageDesc: Update payment method, view invoices, or manage your subscription
trialEnds: Your trial ends on {{date}}. Add a payment method to continue.
checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. You can try again anytime.

upgrade.prompt: Upgrade to unlock more capacity and features.
upgrade.footer: You can change or cancel your plan anytime from the billing portal.

plans.title: Choose Your Plan
plans.subtitle: Scale your workspace with the right plan for your team
plans.downgradeWarning: You'll lose access to premium features at the end of your billing period

contactSales.title: Contact Sales
contactSales.subtitle: Get a custom enterprise quote
contactSales.name: Your Name
contactSales.successMessage: We've received your inquiry. One of our enterprise specialists will be in touch within 1 business day.
contactSales.calendlyPrompt: Want to skip the wait? Schedule a demo directly!

emptyPartner: Standard Partner. No projects yet. Billing appears here once a fee agreement is created.
assessmentInProgress: Assessment in progress — migration fee TBD

review.assessmentDescription: RevBrain will extract and analyze your client's CPQ org.
review.migrationPreview: If Your Client Proceeds to Migration
review.migrationFeeExplanation: Migration fee: percentage of project value (tiered brackets).
review.creditExplanation: The assessment fee is credited against the total migration fee.
review.termsNotice: This is an assessment engagement. You will receive an invoice immediately. Migration pricing will be calculated later from the signed SOW; this fee will be credited.
review.attestation: I accept RevBrain's assessment terms and authorize the assessment fee of {{amount}}.
review.acceptFailed: Failed to accept. Please try again.
review.acceptedMessage: Your account manager has been notified. Redirecting...
review.declineDescription: Please provide a reason for declining this agreement.

reviewB.title: Review Migration Terms
reviewB.zeroFeeNotice: No additional invoices will be issued for this project. Your assessment fee covers the full engagement.
reviewB.attestation: I confirm the declared value of {{amount}} accurately represents the total migration engagement value.
reviewB.invoiceNotice: An invoice for {{amount}} will be generated immediately.
reviewB.acceptedMessage: Your migration is now active. Redirecting...

projectBilling.nextStepMessage: When your client signs the SOW, proceed to set up migration billing.
projectBilling.pendingReviewMessage: Your migration value of {{amount}} is under admin review. We'll email you when terms are ready to accept.
projectBilling.emptyState: Billing details will appear here once a fee agreement is set up.

proceedMigration.title: Proceed to Migration
proceedMigration.dropzoneText: Click to upload PDF, DOCX, or image
proceedMigration.invalidFileType: Only PDF, DOCX, and image files are allowed.
proceedMigration.submitFailed: Failed to submit. Please try again.
proceedMigration.underReviewMessage: Your declared project value of {{amount}} is being reviewed by our team. We'll email you when migration terms are ready to accept.

closeAssessment.title: Close as Assessment Only
closeAssessment.description: This will close the project as assessment-only. No migration fees will apply.
closeAssessment.failed: Failed to close. Please try again.

overdue.projectsBlocked: New project creation is blocked until overdue invoices are resolved.
